title: UserDoc
description: Firestore `users/{uid}` document — the integration boundary between apps/web (writes via Stripe webhook handlers) and apps/mobile (reads to gate paid features). The wire shape carries `status` + `current_period_end` (plus billing identifiers); paid-ness is derived at read time from `status`, never stored as a denormalized field. Strict (`additionalProperties: false`) so no field can drift onto the contract unnoticed.

status.description: Subscription lifecycle state, mirrored from Stripe by the webhook handler in apps/web.

current_period_end.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the current billing period ends. Mirrored from Stripe.

stripe_customer_id.description: Stripe customer ID. Used to launch the customer portal.

stripe_subscription_id.description: Stripe subscription ID. Used by webhook event reconciliation.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the document was first written by the webhook handler.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent webhook-driven update.
